meta.description: We build websites and AI automations for businesses. Dashboards, AI agents, integrations. Constanța · Romania · Remote.

s1.title: Claudiu Comsa
s1.body: We build websites and AI automations for businesses that want more than a brochure site.

s2.subtitle: Built with React, GSAP, and WebGL.
s2.title: Immersive digital experiences.
s2.body: We combine design, animation, and performance to create websites that hold attention.

s3.subtitle: The next project is a conversation away.
s3.title: Clean. Fast. Impactful.
s3.body: Every detail matters. Every interaction designed for speed, clarity, and emotion.

banciuCostin.title: Banciu Costin
banciuCostin.body: Digital presence for a legal industry specialist. Optimized for performance, SEO, and conversion — visitors become contact requests.

aurasjobs.title: Aurasjobs
aurasjobs.body: Processes candidate emails automatically, generates personalized responses, manages the proposal → approval → send flow. Built for a cruise ship recruitment firm.

stereocad.title: Stereocad
stereocad.body: Auto-generates cadastral documents for a specialist firm. Passwordless magic-link auth, real-time stage monitoring, no passwords to manage.
stereocad.tech: Next.js · TypeScript · Magic Link · Document Gen
